title: RBI releases the results of Forward Looking Surveys
description: The Reserve Bank of India today released on its website the results of the following Surveys: Urban Consumer Confidence Survey (UCCS) – March 2026 Inflation Expectations Survey of Households (IESH) – March 2026 Rural Consumer Confidence Survey (RCCS) – March 2026 OBICUS Survey on manufacturing sector – Q3: 2025-26 Industrial Outlook Survey of the Manufacturing Sector for Q4: 2025-26 Survey of Professional Forecasters on Macroeconomic Indicators – Round1 99th Bank Le
